description: Delhi Government Data Protection Policy — DPDP Act 2023

rules.description: Citizen Aadhaar numbers from MCD, DJB, or DSIIDC databases must never be copied to external applications
FIR details, victim information, and case numbers from Delhi Police systems are classified restricted
Salary, pension, and payroll data of Delhi Government employees must not leave official systems
Delhi Jal Board and PWD internal network credentials and infrastructure details are classified
Land records, property registry data, and DDA allotment details containing citizen PII are restricted
Health records from Delhi government hospitals and mohalla clinics are protected under DPDP Act
Tender documents, contractor bids, and procurement data before public announcement are classified
Voter data, electoral roll information, and booth-level officer assignments are election commission restricted
